/usr/bin/c++ -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/ashpaw_server_tests.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/ashpaw_server_tests.dir/tests/admin_command_tests.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ashpaw_server_tests.dir/tests/config_tests.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ashpaw_server_tests.dir/tests/persistence_tests.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ashpaw_server_tests.dir/tests/protocol_tests.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ashpaw_server_tests.dir/tests/world_tests.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ashpaw_server_tests.dir/tests/integration_tests.cpp.o -o ashpaw_server_tests  libashpaw_server_lib.a vcpkg_installed/x64-linux/debug/lib/manual-link/libCatch2Maind.a vcpkg_installed/x64-linux/debug/lib/libenet.a vcpkg_installed/x64-linux/debug/lib/libspdlogd.a vcpkg_installed/x64-linux/debug/lib/libfmtd.a vcpkg_installed/x64-linux/debug/lib/libtomlplusplus.a vcpkg_installed/x64-linux/debug/lib/libCatch2d.a
